reviews.comment:
Tramité el carnet de conducir internacional. Muy buen servicio y rápida atención. El trámite duró 20 min.

(Translated by Google)
I applied for my international driving permit. Excellent service and fast turnaround. The process took 20 minutes.

I don't remember what I did in that place

reviews.comment:
Lugar céntrico por excelencia,lugar con con una historia muy particular,centro de reunión, no solamente de clientes,sino también de escritores,periodistas y hombres de negocios,que le han dado al lugar el prestigio que tiene,con el agregado de un servicio excelente.

(Translated by Google)
A central location par excellence, a place with a very particular history, a meeting place not only for customers, but also for writers, journalists and businessmen, who have given the place its prestige, with the added benefit of excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9200897225069866922/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzbnFiQm93RRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Spotlessly clean restrooms. Very friendly staff.

reviews.comment:
un desastre lamentablemente desatencion absoluta .Los playeros son especialistas en no verte y menos en saludarte.

(Translated by Google)
A disaster, unfortunately, absolute neglect. The beachgoers are experts at not seeing you, much less greeting you.
